title: Market activity digest, Kalshi + Polymarket (2026-07-23)
text:
Note: 200 auto-generated parlay/combination listings were excluded from this digest as venue plumbing.

Volume move on Polymarket: "Will LeBron James play for the Atlanta Hawks in 2026-27?" (1931099) 24h volume went from $40k to $254k (6.4x).

Volume move on Polymarket: "Will the price of Bitcoin be above $62,000 on July 23?" (2947127) 24h volume went from $45k to $229k (5.1x).

Volume move on Polymarket: "Valorant: Global Esports vs FULL SENSE (BO3) - VCT Pacific Group Alpha" (3002187) 24h volume went from $40k to $131k (3.2x).
